why: Tier 2, fresh-node path (Gate 0 folds into Gate A): grades whether the agent puts the node's material design decisions to the user as options WITH a recommended default (design-questions.md) before the mockup, rather than choosing silently. AssemblyAI has real choices: which operations, streaming vs batch, lanes.

ground_truth.expected_archetype: data-flow processor (audio); some ops may be tool-shaped (dual)

rubric: design_questions: presents the node's material decisions (operations to expose, streaming vs batch, auth) as multiple-choice WITH a marked recommended default + tradeoff, per design-questions.md
not_silent: does NOT silently pick the design without surfacing options to the user
recorded: the mockup records the chosen decisions (Design decisions section)
gate_stop: ends awaiting Gate B approval, no code
